title: Custom Software Engineer
description:
**Project Role :** 
 Custom Software Engineer
   

  

**Project Role Description :** 
 Develop custom software solutions to design, code, and enhance components across systems or applications. Use modern frameworks and agile practices to deliver scalable, high\\-performing solutions tailored to specific business needs.
   

  

**Must have skills :** 
 Microservices and Light Weight Architecture
   

  

**Good to have skills :** 
 NA
   

  

**Minimum 7\\.5 Year(s) Of Experience Is Required**
**Educational Qualification :** 
 15 years full time education
   

  

 Summary:
   

  

 As a Custom Software Engineer, a typical day involves designing, building, and configuring applications tailored to meet specific business processes and application requirements. This role requires continuous engagement with evolving project needs, ensuring that software solutions align with organizational goals. The workday often includes collaborating with various stakeholders to understand requirements, iterating on application designs, and refining configurations to optimize performance and usability. Attention to detail and adaptability are essential as the engineer navigates through complex application landscapes to deliver effective and efficient software solutions that support business operations.
   

  

 Roles \\& Responsibilities:
   

  

* Expected to be an SME, collaborate and manage the team to perform.
* Responsible for team decisions.
* Engage with multiple teams and contribute on key decisions.
* Provide solutions to problems for their immediate team and across multiple teams.
* Lead the development and implementation of software components ensuring alignment with project goals.
* Facilitate knowledge sharing and mentoring within the team to foster professional growth.
* Coordinate cross\\-functional efforts to ensure seamless integration of software modules.
* Support continuous improvement initiatives by identifying and addressing process inefficiencies.


 Professional \\& Technical Skills:
   

  

* Must To Have Skills: Proficiency in Microservices and Light Weight Architecture.
* Experience in designing scalable and maintainable service\\-oriented applications.
* Strong understanding of distributed systems and API design principles.
* Ability to troubleshoot and optimize application performance in complex environments.
* Familiarity with containerization and orchestration technologies to support microservices deployment.
* Skilled in implementing security best practices within microservices frameworks.


 Additional Information:
   

  

* The candidate should have minimum 7\\.5 years of experience in Microservices and Light Weight Architecture.
* This position is based at our Mumbai office.
* A 15 years full time education is required.

title: Software Development Engineer II
description:
At F5, we strive to bring a better digital world to life. Our teams empower organizations across the globe to create, secure, and run applications that enhance how we experience our evolving digital world. We are passionate about cybersecurity, from protecting consumers from fraud to enabling companies to focus on innovation.
   

  

 Everything we do centers around people. That means we obsess over how to make the lives of our customers, and their customers, better. And it means we prioritize a diverse F5 community where each individual can thrive.
   

  

 Our Employees
   

  

 Are valued and empowered, collaborative and team oriented, innovative in their approach and passionate about their work. They are reliable, trustworthy, and open with a high level of integrity. We value diversity, are inclusive and are committed to a global mindset.
   

  

 The seniority of the position is flexible, and leveling will be adjusted based on your experience and expertise.
   

  

 Position Summary:
   

  

 F5’s solution, BIG\\-IP BNK/CNF, brings critical carrier\\-grade capabilities to a Kubernetes environment. It enables service providers, enterprise, and AI customers to create a bridge from their existing 4G/legacy enterprise networks to the AI enabled cloud\\-native 5G core network. BIG\\-IP BNK/CNF provides high performance traffic management, visibility, and security at container ingress (North/South) into the 5G core Kubernetes clusters. You will be working on building the crucial telemetry, observability, and analytics functionality for F5’s BNK/CNF product. You will work with a team that is smart, passionate and customer experience oriented. The ideal candidate is an energetic, hands\\-on, and creative problem solver!
   

  

 Primary Responsibilities:
   

  

 Independently determines and develops approaches to solutions for assigned projects by identifying, resolving, and mitigating risk and communicating to others
   

  

 Provides technical solutions to detail certain aspects of product design and ensures that resulting design specification fits into technical architectural framework.
   

  

 Performs analysis to define design requirements for modification to existing tools, utilities, system structures, environments and provide technical perspective for input into project scope and estimating activities
   

  

 Recommends and maintains technical design methodologies, processes, and standards
   

  

 Provides technical guidance to junior level engineers
   

  

 Assist Tech Leads and Management with project scope
   

  

 Consistently meet commitments
   

  

 Assisting and driving customer solutions
   

  

 Participates in hiring and onboarding process
   

  

 Conducts presentations internally and externally
   

  

 Knowledge, Skills, and Abilities:
   

  

**Required Skills \\-**
 Excellent coding skills in C or C\\+\\+ or Go.
   

  

 Mastery of standard data structures and algorithms, run\\-time complexities, IPC, etc. is required.
   

  

 Must have background in networking technologies \\& protocols like IP, TCP, UDP, DNS, HTTP etc.
   

  

 Experience in complex Kubernetes orchestrated micro services is a must
   

  

 Experience building networking, storage, security solutions in Public Cloud is needed
   

  

 Exceptional problem solving, analytical and trouble\\-shooting skills.
   

  

 Typically requires a minimum of 5 years of related experience with a Bachelor’s degree; or 3 year with a Master’s degree; or equivalent experience.
   

  

**Preferred Skills \\-**
 Experience working with S3 and EC2 or Google Cloud Storage (GCS) and Google Compute Engine (GCE) is a plus
   

  

 Good knowledge in various CNI and routing in public cloud infrastructure is desirable
   

  

 Experience with Linux, node storage, Kubernetes RBAC etc is desirable
   

  

 Experience with gitlab/github or other source code management is needed.
   

  

 Able to collaborate and thrive in a fast\\-paced high\\-performance environment
   

  

 Regularly demonstrates collaboration by promoting others’ ideas, working well within and other teams, influencing others, and making teams successful.
   

  

 Candidate must be passionate enjoy solving complex problems. This is a fast paced, innovative environment and requires candidate to grasp new technologies quickly. Often knowledge is self\\-taught as formal training in emerging technologies may not exist.
   

  

 Demonstrated excellence in written and verbal communications. Regularly finds ways to communicate widely through discussions, white papers, publications, and other.
   

  

 Willingness and ability to write good functional specification and design documents.
   

  

 The Job Description is intended to be a general representation of the responsibilities and requirements of the job. However, the description may not be all\\-inclusive, and responsibilities and requirements are subject to change.

title: Software Development Engineer II - Fullstack
description:
**About HighLevel**
 HighLevel is an AI\\-powered business operating system that gives agencies, entrepreneurs and SMBs the infrastructure to build, automate and scale. Today, HighLevel supports SMBs across 150\\+ countries, fueling community\\-driven growth rooted in real customer outcomes.
   

  

 To date, businesses operating on HighLevel have generated over $7 billion in ecosystem value, demonstrating the impact of shared infrastructure at scale. By centralizing conversations, automation and intelligence into one system, we help businesses move faster, reduce complexity and execute efficiently.
   

  

 Behind the platform, HighLevel powers more than 4 billion API hits and 2\\.5 billion message events daily. With 250 terabytes of distributed data, 250\\+ microservices and over 1 million domain names supported, our architecture is built for performance, resilience and long\\-term scalability.
   

  

**Our People**
 With over 2,000 team members across 10\\+ countries, HighLevel operates as a global, remote\\-first organization built for speed and ownership. We value initiative, clarity and execution, creating space for ambitious people to build systems that support millions of businesses worldwide. Here, innovation thrives, ideas are celebrated and people come first, no matter where they call home.
   

  

**Our Impact**
 Every month, HighLevel enables more than 1\\.5 billion messages, 200 million leads and 20 million conversations for the more than 1 million businesses we support. Behind those numbers are real people building independence, expanding opportunity and creating measurable impact. We’re proud to be a part of that.
   

  

 Learn more about us on our YouTube Channel or Blog Posts
   

  

**About The Role**
 You’ll be joining our WordPress team, a group of dedicated engineers, creators, and support specialists who are passionate about building fast, reliable, and scalable digital experiences. Together, we help customers create high\\-performance websites on our managed hosting platform. Our team supports more than 20,000 businesses and delivers a seamless experience for millions of visitors every month. We collaborate closely, innovate constantly, and take pride in empowering businesses to grow online.
   

  

 As a Senior Software Engineer, you’ll be contributing in shaping the experience of our platform. You’ll solve complex challenges across frontend / backend architecture, performance, micro\\-frontends, and distributed backend systems. You’ll contribute to overall growth and stability of the platform, collaborate closely with PMs and ensure exceptional user experiences at scale.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Own and contribute to architecture and development across products, driving technical excellence in both frontend and backend systems.
* Develop and optimize backend API services with test\\-driven development including advanced caching and messaging for reliability and scalability.
* Deliver high\\-quality frontend experiences using modern frameworks, with strong fundamentals in component\\-based architectures and state management.
* Integrate and support observability, logging, and monitoring to ensure platform reliability and rapid incident response.
* Ensure top\\-tier application security and compliance, applying best practices across frontend, backend, and API layers (authentication, authorization, rate\\-limiting, OWASP).
* Leverage LLMs and AI tools to write, refactor, test, and debug code efficiently, implementing guardrails for reliability.
* Participate in design reviews, deep dives, and on\\-call rotations to support a culture of accountability and operational excellence.


**Requirements**
* 2\\+ years of hands\\-on software engineering experience building and scaling robust backend systems and high\\-performance frontend applications.
* Strong backend engineering and distributed system design skills, with hands\\-on experience in API development, data modeling, and systems architecture using Node.js (NestJS preferred), TypeScript, MongoDB, and Redis.
* Expertise in backend performance optimization, caching strategies, and event\\-driven architectures (e.g., Redis, Kafka, Pub/Sub).
* Familiar with modern frontend frameworks ( Vue, Angular, React), advanced UI engineering patterns, and CSS libraries like Bootstrap or Tailwind CSS.
* Advanced experience with complex state management libraries (e.g., Redux, Vuex, MobX) and architectural design of large\\-scale application state.
* Proven track record of optimizing frontend performance and web vitals at scale, including experience with server\\-side rendering (SSR), edge, or hybrid rendering architectures.
* Familiarity with frontend and backend observability \\- including monitoring, tracing, error tracking, and performance profiling in production (e.g., Grafana, Prometheus, Sentry, PostHog).
* Strong understanding of security best practices across the full stack—including authentication, authorization, access control, secure data flow, and privacy compliance.
* Excellent communication and cross\\-functional collaboration skills, able to drive complex initiatives, lead technical discussions, and mentor junior engineers.


 ₹0 \\- ₹0 a year
   

  

**EEO Statement:**
 At HighLevel, we value diversity. In fact, we understand it makes our organisation stronger. We are committed to inclusive hiring/promotion practices that evaluate skill sets, abilities, and qualifications without regard to any characteristic unrelated to performing the job at the highest level. Our objective is to foster an environment where really talented employees from all walks of life can be their true and whole selves, cherished and welcomed for their differences while providing excellent service to our clients and learning from one another along the way! Reasonable accommodations may be made to enable individuals with disabilities to perform essential functions.
   

  

 We encourage you to review our Privacy Polic y before submitting your application.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

description:
**Job Description**
 Yiino’s mission is to move people and goods more efficiently and maps are at the core of everything we build. Every ride, every delivery, every route depends on accurate, scalable, and intelligent map systems.
   

  

 We’re looking for a
 **Software Engineer** 
 to join our
 **Maps Routing Engine \\& APIs team** 
 , where you’ll design and scale the systems that power route planning, navigation, ETAs, and fare calculations for millions of users. This is a high\\-impact role where your work will directly influence how people move in cities every day.
   

  

**Why this role matters**
 The Maps team is responsible for building and maintaining the technologies that represent Africa’s roads, continuously ingesting real changes, and ensuring that routes are always fresh, accurate, and optimized. Our routing platform supports thousands of queries per second, serving rides, food delivery, package delivery, and new mobility innovations on a scale.
   

  

 As a senior engineer, you’ll help shape the future of maps at Yiino designing robust routing algorithms, building high\\-performance distributed systems, and delivering APIs used across all Yiino products.
   

  

 Job Responsibilities
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Design \\& build solutions that improve Yiino’s routing efficiency, ETA accuracy, and scalability.
* Develop distributed systems that can handle thousands of concurrent requests across multiple modalities.
* Operate at scale: deliver, monitor, and support high\\-performance services powering millions of rides and deliveries.
* Collaborate cross\\-functionally with engineers, scientists, product managers, and operations to align goals and bring new ideas to life.
* Drive innovation: propose and implement new approaches that advance Yiino’s maps platform.
* Contribute to reliability: participate in an on\\-call rotation to ensure services run smoothly on a scale.


**What We’re Looking For**
* Bachelor’s degree (or higher) in Computer Science or a related field.
* 2\\+ years of experience in software engineering.
* Strong coding skills in Java, Go, Python, or similar languages.
* Experience designing, deploying, and scaling backend systems.


**Nice\\-to\\-haves**
* Experience with distributed systems and backend infrastructure.
* Knowledge of graph search algorithms or geospatial systems.
* Familiarity with Maps, Routing, or GIS domains.
* MS or advanced degree in Computer Science.
* Hands\\-on experience building high\\-performance, highly available systems with monitoring and observability practices.
* Strong communication skills for cross\\-functional collaboration.
* Self\\-motivated, curious, and eager to learn.


**Why join Yiino?**
* Impact at scale: Your code will power millions of rides and deliveries across multiple regions daily.
* Cutting\\-edge challenges: Work on large\\-scale distributed systems, routing algorithms, and real\\-time data on a massive scale.
* Growth \\& learning: Collaborate with industry experts and expand your skills in maps, routing, and mobility tech.
* Mission\\-driven work: Help redefine how people and goods move in cities around the world.


 If you’re passionate about maps, algorithms, and building systems that move the world, we’d love to hear from you.
   

  

 Yiino is an equal opportunity employer and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any kind. We’re committed to providing our employees a work environment that is progressive and open\\-minded. Our employment philosophy is to hire the best people and empower them to do the best work of their lives. Employment decisions are based on business needs and individual merit without regard to race, color, religion, ethnicity, sexual orientation, nationality, marital status, gender or age.

 Quorum Software connects people and information across the energy value chain. Twenty years ago, we built the first software for gas plant accountants. Pipeline operators came next, followed by land administrators, pumpers, and planners. For more information, visit quorumsoftware.com

 Quorum Software is the world's largest provider of digital technology focused solely on business workflows that empower the next evolution of energy. From emerging companies to supermajors, throughout every region of the globe, customers rely on Quorum's proven innovation and unmatched global expertise to streamline business operations and make data\\-driven decisions that optimize profitability and growth. Our industry\\-leading solutions are transforming energy companies across the entire value chain, helping visionary leaders evolve their organizations into modern energy companies.
   

  

**Who We Are Looking For**
 Are you excited by challenges? Do you enjoy working in a fast\\-paced, international and dynamic environment? Then now is the time to join Quorum Software, a rapidly growing company and industry leader in oil \\& gas transformation.
   

  

**Job Purpose**
 As a Software Engineer in the engineering team, you will deliver end\\-to\\-end features across the full stack from React frontends through event\\-driven Node.js microservices to infrastructure\\-as\\-code.
   

  

 This is beyond a pure front\\-end or back\\-end role. You will own features from UI through Kafka event flow to Kubernetes deployment, working within domain\\-driven service boundaries alongside architects and domain experts. You will ship production code frequently, write tests that matter, and operate what you build.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Build and ship end\\-to\\-end features across React frontends and TypeScript/Node.js microservices, owning the full path from user interaction through API, event propagation, and data persistence
* Design and implement backend microservices in TypeScript on Node.js, following domain\\-driven design boundaries.
* Build responsive, data\\-rich frontend interfaces in React using TypeScript
* Develop and consume RESTful APIs (OpenAPI 3\\.0\\) in an event\\-driven architecture using Apache Kafka for asynchronous domain event propagation
* Implement and maintain PostgreSQL schemas, queries, and migrations for dedicated per\\-service databases
* Write comprehensive unit tests, integration tests, E2E tests for critical paths, and API contract tests
* Contribute to CI/CD pipeline quality — builds, lint, SAST scans, integration tests, and deployment.
* Collaborate with the integration team on connectors to external systems.
* Work within an agile delivery model with two\\-week sprints, daily standups, and structured demo/retro cadences
* And other duties as assigned.


**What To Bring**
* 4\\+ years of professional software development experience
* Strong proficiency in TypeScript and modern JavaScript (ES2020\\+), with hands\\-on Node.js backend experience
* Experience building frontend applications with React (functional components, hooks, state management)
* Proficient in AI\\-assisted development workflows using tools such as Claude Code, Cursor, or similar AI coding agents as part of the daily development cycle, from code generation and review through testing and documentation
* Solid understanding of relational databases, particularly PostgreSQL (schema design, indexing, query optimisation, migrations)
* Experience designing and consuming RESTful APIs; familiarity with OpenAPI / Swagger specifications
* Comfortable with Git workflows (feature branches, pull requests, rebasing) and CI/CD pipelines
* Understanding of containerisation with Docker and basic Kubernetes concepts (pods, services, deployments)
* Strong testing discipline — unit, integration, and end\\-to\\-end testing with frameworks such as Jest, Playwright, or Cypress
* Effective communicator who thrives in cross\\-functional, geographically distributed teams


**Additional Details**
* Visa Sponsorship: Employment eligibility to work with Quorum Software in India is required as the company will not pursue visa sponsorship for this position.


**Quorum Diversity Statement:** 
 At Quorum, we are committed to fostering, cultivating, and preserving a culture of belonging. We want to be the place where a diverse pool of talented people join us, stay with us and do their best work. With a diverse team of employees, we grow and learn better together. The collective sum of the individual differences, life experiences, knowledge, innovation, self\\-expression, and talent that our employees invest in their work represents not only part of our culture, but our reputation and our achievements. We are fully focused on equity and equality and believe deeply in diversity of race, gender, sexual orientation, age, religion, ethnicity, national origin, ability, neurodiversity and all the other characteristics that make us unique.
   

  

*Quorum Business Solutions and Quorum Software are Equal Opportunity Employers. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, ancestry, veteran status, disability, genetic information, or any other basis protected by law.*

 Quorum Software does not charge fees, request payments, conduct interviews via messaging apps, or request the installation of software at any stage of the recruitment process. title: Lead Software Engineer
description:
Are you ready to dive into the fast\\-paced world of ground\\-breaking finance and technology? If you have a passion for innovation, a thirst for challenge, and a love for all things fintech, then look no further!
   

  

 LSEG (London Stock Exchange Group) is more than a diversified global financial markets infrastructure and data business. We are open\\-access partners with a dedication to excellence in delivering the services our customers expect from us. With extensive experience, deep knowledge and worldwide presence across financial markets, we enable businesses and economies around the world to fund innovation, manage risk and create jobs. It’s how we’ve contributed to supporting the financial stability and growth of communities and economies globally for more than 300 years.
   

  

 We are seeking a highly skilled Senior Software Engineer to join our Risk Intelligence division within the Digital Identity \\& Fraud (DI\\&F) Platform team. In this role, you will work closely with multiple development teams to build and enhance our latest platform offering for Digital Identity flagship products. In addition, you will help key business stakeholders to translate their vision into reality by owning each and all of the following phases: Architecture and design, Security first mindset, epic and story collaboration, agile development, 3rd party vendor API integration and delivery. We build products that run at scale for large financial institutions, and our platform supports that vision.
   

  

 The ideal candidate will have a strong technical background, problem\\-solving abilities, and extensive experience with .NET Core or Java and cloud platforms. You will be a key player in designing, developing, and maintaining scalable microservices\\-based applications in a fast\\-paced and agile environment.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities:
   

  

* Design, develop, and maintain high\\-performance APIs consumed by third\\-party customers for fraud prevention, identity verification, and account validation.
* Collaborate with cross\\-functional teams to understand business requirements and translate them into technical solutions.
* Own the delivery of critical platform capabilities, working autonomously and with little direction; ensure the timely completion of work from other team members, delegating work when required and mentoring others.
* Design, develop and socialize microservices based distributed systems utilizing cloud\\-native architecture.
* Build positive relationships with internal and external stakeholders, growing own network and collaborating with other teams.
* Communicate complex / technical information clearly and concisely in an audience appropriate format.
* Ensure code quality by adhering to SOLID principles, design patterns, and using static and dynamic code analysis tools such as SonarQube and Coverity.
* Work in an agile environment, contributing to SCRUM and Kanban workflows to meet tight delivery schedules.
* Build and deploy containerized solutions using Kubernetes and Docker for cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP.


 Key Technical Skills:
   

  

* Programming Languages: 5\\+ years of .NET Core 6\\+ with C\\# or Java
* Backend Development: 5\\+ years of Multi\\-threading, exception handling, and ORM frameworks such as Entity Framework Core or JPA
* Databases: PostgreSQL/MySQL with strong data modeling and SQL skills
* Testing Tools: JUnit, NUnit
* Cloud Platforms: 5\\+ years of Azure, AWS, or GCP
* Containerization: 5\\+ years of Docker, Kubernetes, or similar
* Agile Development: 5\\+ years of SCRUM, Kanban, TDD


 Other Required Skills:
   

  

* Strong analytical and problem\\-solving capabilities
* Excellent communication, presentation, and documentation skills
* Ability to work independently and manage dynamic priorities
* Strong collaboration skills with internal and external stakeholders
* Ability to articulate technical concepts and designs to non\\-technical teams


 Nice To Have:
   

  

* TypeScript, React, Node.js
* Experience in the FinTech industry, especially in financial markets or fraud prevention systems.
* Experience with event\\-driven architecture and message brokering tools including RabbitMQ, AWS MQ, or Azure Queue.
* Familiarity with NoSQL databases like MongoDB, DynamoDB, or CosmosDB.
* Experience working with highly distributed, data\\-intensive systems.


**Education/ Certifications:**
* A good relevant degree is desirable, but experience and the right approach to work are just as meaningful.


**Benefits**
 We are looking for intellectually curious people, passionate about the bigger picture of how technology industry is evolving, ready to ask difficult questions and deal with complicated scenarios! If you are creative and a problem solver, this is the place to be as will be supporting you to fast\\-forward your career!
   

  

 We enhance each employee’s potential through personal development through a wide range of learning tools both formal and informal.
   

  

 LSEG is a leading global financial markets infrastructure and data provider. Our purpose is driving financial stability, empowering economies and enabling customers to create sustainable growth.
   

  

 Our purpose is the foundation on which our culture is built. Our values of
 **Integrity, Partnership** 
 ,
 **Excellence** 
 and
 **Change** 
 underpin our purpose and set the standard for everything we do, every day. They go to the heart of who we are and guide our decision making and everyday actions.
   

  

 Working with us means that you will be part of a dynamic organisation of 25,000 people across 65 countries. However, we will value your individuality and enable you to bring your true self to work so you can help enrich our diverse workforce. You will be part of a collaborative and creative culture where we encourage new ideas and are committed to sustainability across our global business. You will experience the critical role we have in helping to re\\-engineer the financial ecosystem to support and drive sustainable economic growth. Together, we are aiming to achieve this growth by accelerating the just transition to net zero, enabling growth of the green economy and creating inclusive economic opportunity.
   

  

 LSEG offers a range of tailored benefits and support, including healthcare, retirement planning, paid volunteering days and wellbeing initiatives.

This means that we do not discriminate on the basis of anyone’s race, religion, colour, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, marital status, veteran status, pregnancy or disability, or any other basis protected under applicable law. Conforming with applicable law, we can reasonably accommodate applicants' and employees' religious practices and beliefs, as well as mental health or physical disability needs.
   

  

 Proud to share LSEG in the India is Great Place to Work certified (Jun ’25 – Jun ’26\\).
   

  

 Learn more about life and purpose of our company directly from India colleagues’ video: Bengaluru, India \\| Where We Work \\| LSEG

title: Principal Software Engineer - Distributed
description:
**About MariaDB** 




 MariaDB is making a big impact on the world. Whether you’re checking your bank account, buying a coffee, shopping online, making a phone call, listening to music, taking out a loan or ordering takeout – MariaDB is the backbone of applications used everyday. Companies small and large, including 75% of the Fortune 500, run MariaDB, touching the lives of billions of people. With massive reach through Linux distributions, enterprise deployments and public clouds, MariaDB is uniquely positioned as the leading database for modern application development.
 



 We’re looking for a
 **Principal Software Engineer (Distributed)** 
 who’s excited about solving hard problems in distributed systems and enjoys turning complex challenges into elegant, reliable solutions.
 



  





**The Role** 




 You’ll join a small, highly skilled team where your work will have a direct impact. Expect to dig deep into replication, sharding, concurrency, and performance optimization—making our systems faster, smarter, and more resilient. You’ll collaborate globally, contribute to open source, and push the limits of what a distributed database can do.
 



  





**What You’ll Do** 



* Build and test distributed database solutions that scale.
* Make systems rock\\-solid in performance and reliability, across both on\\-prem and cloud.
* Work on replication, sharding, and consistency models (Raft, MVCC, ACID).
* Profile, debug, and fine\\-tune performance with tools like perf, htop, iostat—and your own tricks.
* Keep code clean and reviewable with Git.
* Shape infrastructure using CMake or Bazel.
* Configure and monitor with YAML/JSONnet, Prometheus, and Grafana.
* Dive into Linux/Unix internals (systemd, cgroups, logging, core dumps).
* Automate testing and performance validation with load\\-testing scripts (YandexTank or your own).



  





**What You Bring** 



* 5\\+ years of professional experience in C\\+\\+ (Python/Bash scripting a plus).
* Working knowledge of SQL (MariaDB/MySQL/PostgreSQL).
* Familiarity with distributed systems concepts (concurrency, multithreading, ACID).
* Comfort with Linux/Unix systems. (systemd, cgroups, logging, etc), and debugging tools.
* Understanding of performance profiling approaches.
* Bonus: Raft/MVCC experience, open\\-source contributions, Prometheus/Grafana, performance/load testing.



  





**Location** 




 Remote \\- India
 



  





**Why You’ll Love It Here** 



* A globally distributed team where your code truly matters.
* Remote or Hybrid work options (location dependent)
* Projects that stretch your skills and make an impact at scale.
* Competitive pay, 25 days paid annual leave (plus holidays), and a culture that values creativity and clean engineering.



  





**How to Apply** 




 If you are interested in this position, please submit your application along with your CV/Resume through our ATS Greenhouse on our MariaDB Careers site.
 


* At MariaDB we celebrate the diverse experiences and perspectives of our employees because this drives innovation and success. MariaDB is an equal opportunity employer dedicated to creating a welcoming and inclusive workplace for everyone.
* MariaDB does not sponsor work visas or relocation.
* MariaDB is committed to providing accommodations for individuals with disabilities within our application and interview process. To request an accommodation due to a disability, please inform your recruiter.
* MariaDB will not accept agency resumes without a prior contractual agreement with HR. Please do not forward resumes to any recruiting alias or employee directly. MariaDB is not responsible for paying any fees associated with any unsolicited submitted CV/Resumes.

title: Senior Software Packager
description:
Providers, health plans, employers, life sciences companies, and governments across the globe leverage Merative’s trusted technology and human expertise to drive real progress. We help our clients orient information and insights around the people they serve to improve decision\\-making and performance.
   

  

 We work with more than 4,500 customers across the health and social care ecosystem, including:
   

  

* 9 of 10 top U.S. hospitals
* 7 of the top 10 U.S. payers and 40 percent of Fortune 100 employers
* 35\\+ state, local, and federal government agencies
* All top 20 pharma


 As the industry has a unique opportunity for change, we aim to be a driving force – using the breadth of our portfolio and depth of our expertise to drive shared progress in health.
   

  

 We are seeking an experienced Senior Software Packager with strong expertise in macOS and Windows software packaging and scripting to support enterprise application deployment across managed endpoints. This role is responsible for designing, building, testing, and maintaining reliable, secure, and user\\-friendly software packages for Windows and macOS devices managed through Microsoft Intune and Jamf Pro. The engineer will work closely with Endpoint Engineering, Security, and Operations teams to ensure smooth deployments, minimal user disruption, and compliance with enterprise standards. The position serves as a technical authority for application packaging, complex troubleshooting, and scripting automation.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
 Software Packaging \\& Deployment
   

  

* Create, maintain, and optimize software packages for Windows and macOS endpoints
* Package applications using formats such as EXE, MSI, MSIX, IntuneWin, PKG, DMG, and shell\\-based installers
* Ensure packages are optimized for silent install, upgrade, uninstall, and rollback scenarios
* Validate packages across OS versions and device types prior to production deployment


 Endpoint Management \\& Tooling
   

  

* Deploy and manage packaged applications using Microsoft Intune and Jamf Pro
* Support application lifecycle management including new releases, updates, and retirements
* Work with Intune and Jamf policies to ensure consistent and compliant application delivery


 Scripting \\& Automation
   

  

* Develop and maintain automation scripts using:
+ PowerShell (Windows)
+ Bash / Zsh (macOS)

* Use scripting to manage pre‑install checks, post‑install validation, error handling, and remediation
* Assist with packaging automation and detection logic improvements


 Troubleshooting \\& Support
   

  

* Troubleshoot failed installations, upgrades, and compliance issues across macOS and Windows
* Analyze logs and diagnostics from Intune, Jamf, and endpoint devices
* Provide Tier‑3 supports for complex application deployment issues


 Security, Compliance \\& Documentation
   

  

* Follow secure packaging best practices to ensure applications meet enterprise security standards
* Collaborate with Security teams to address vulnerabilities and compliance requirements
* Create and maintain packaging documentation, standards, and operational runbooks
* Ensure packaging activities align with ITSM and change management practices


**Required Skills:**
* Bachelor's degree in computer science, Information Technology, Engineering, or strong hands‑on experience
* 5 \\- 8\\+ years of overall IT experience
* 5\\+ years of specialized experience in Windows and macOS application packaging
* Experience supporting enterprise‑scale deployments using Intune and/or Jamf
* Scripting proficiency in PowerShell, Bash, or Zsh
* Experience with application detection rules, dependencies, and requirement checks
* Working knowledge of Windows Registry, services, file system, and macOS equivalents
* Attention to detail and quality in packaging standards
* Clear written and verbal communication skills


**Preferred Skills:**
* Relevant certifications or practical experience in endpoint management and scripting
* Familiarity with Apple Business Manager


**Note \\- The role requires working in UK business hours. Rotational shifts may be required based on business needs.**
